title: Lucid Group (LCID) Q1 2026 earnings results miss revenue estimates on wider than expected loss
text: Lucid Motors missed analyst expectations significantly in Q1 2026, with revenue coming in at $282.5 million versus the expected $358.51 million, and earnings per share loss of $2.82 per share versus the expected loss of $2.30 per share. Revenue missed by 21% against the $358.51 million estimate, with the revenue coming to $282 million representing the largest shortfall in more than four years. Lucid's net loss widened from the prior year's $366 million loss to a sizable $1 billion loss during the first quarter. Additionally, free cash flow was -$1.44 billion, worse than -$589.9 million a year earlier. Deliveries of Lucid's recently launched Gravity SUV were significantly impacted in February due to a rear-seat defect that required a recall. Management suspended full-year guidance, citing an ongoing review by incoming CEO Silvio Napoli.
